title: Ryan McGoldrick
extract: Ryan McGoldrick (born 12 January 1981) is a professional rugby league footballer for the Darlington Point Coleambally Roosters in the Group 20 competition in regional New South Wales, Australia. He has previously played for the Salford City Reds, Hull FC, Castleford Tigers and the Cronulla-Sutherland Sharks, as well as representing the New South Wales Waratahs in rugby union. He is a utility player, and has played for Castleford as a full-back, centre, stand-off, scrum-half and loose forward.
